source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/07_(CYAN) GT1717C, GT1717CP/91_인증 - 국내/02. G series + CYAN/1. 신청시 제출본/04 기타구비서류/KT155_주식회사_넴코코리아_kolas 인정서.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: KOLAS accreditation scope excerpt for certificate KT155 covering electrical, communications, medical device, EMC, software, energy-efficiency, and environmental/reliability testing.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports verification that the accredited laboratory scope includes listed standards, product/material categories, test ranges, and on-site test status.
keyPoints: Certificate identifier repeatedly shown as 제 KT155호.
Electrical testing scope includes 계측기기, 가정용 전기기기, 유/무선 통신기기, 의료기기, 전자기적합성, 소프트웨어, 에너지효율, 환경 및 신뢰성.
Most listed rows show 사업장 as 소재지 and 현장시험 as N.
Medical device safety and EMC scopes include EN/IEC 60601 and ISO/IEC 80601 series standards.
Energy-efficiency scope includes Korean Ministry of Trade, Industry and Energy notices for 효율관리기자재 and 대기전력저감 programs.

concepts.name: 계측기기 안전 요구사항 시험
concepts.evidence: Safety requirements for electrical equipment for measurement, control, and laboratory use

concepts.name: 의료기기 전기안전 시험
concepts.evidence: Medical electrical equipment– Part 1: General requirement for basic safety and essential performance

concepts.name: 소프트웨어 사이버보안 시험
concepts.evidence: ETSI EN 303 645 V2.1.1 소프트웨어 CYBER; Cyber Security for Consumer Internet of Things: Baseline Requirements

evidence.claim: The document is associated with certificate identifier KT155.
The scope includes electrical testing for measurement, control, and laboratory equipment under EN 61010-1.
evidence.evidenceText: EN 61010-1:2010 /A1:2019 계측기기 Safety requirements for electrical equipment for measurement, control, and laboratory use – Part 1: General requirements

evidence.claim: The scope includes IVD medical equipment requirements under EN IEC 61010-2-101:2022.
evidence.evidenceText: EN IEC 61010-2-101:2022 계측기기 Safety requirements for electrical equipment for measurement, control, and laboratory use – Part 2-101: Particular requirements in vitro diagnostic (IVD) medical equipment

evidence.claim: The scope includes wireless communication device testing from 9 kHz to 40 GHz for ANSI C63.10-2013.
evidence.evidenceText: ANSI C63.10 - 2013 유/무선 통신기기 American National Standard of Procedures for Compliance Testing of Unlicensed Wireless Devices 9 ㎑ ~ 40 ㎓

evidence.claim: The medical device scope includes EN 60601-1 general requirements for basic safety and essential performance.
evidence.evidenceText: EN 60601-1:2006 +A1:2013 +A2:2021 의료기기 Medical electrical equipment– Part 1: General requirement for basic safety and essential performance

evidence.claim: The EMC scope includes EN 60601-1-2:2015 +A1:2021 for medical electrical equipment electromagnetic disturbances.
evidence.evidenceText: EN 60601-1-2:2015 +A1:2021 의료기기 Medical electrical equipment – Part 1-2: General requirements for basic safety and essential performance - Collateral standard: Electromagnetic disturbances - Requirements and tests

evidence.claim: The software scope includes consumer IoT cybersecurity baseline requirements under ETSI EN 303 645.
evidence.evidenceText: ETSI EN 303 645 V2.1.1 소프트웨어 CYBER; Cyber Security for Consumer Internet of Things: Baseline Requirements

evidence.claim: The software scope includes health software security lifecycle activities under IEC 81001-5-1:2021.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 81001-5-1:2021 소프트웨어 Health software and health IT systems safety, effectiveness and security - Part 5-1: Security - Activities in the product life cycle

evidence.claim: The energy efficiency scope includes the Korean efficiency management equipment operating regulation notice dated 2024.10.29.
evidence.evidenceText: 산업통상자원부 고시 제2024-169호 (2024.10.29.) 가정용 전기기기 효율관리기자재의 운용규정

evidence.claim: The energy efficiency scope includes the Korean standby power reduction program operating regulation notice dated 2022.2.15.
evidence.evidenceText: 산업통상자원부고시 제2022-33호 (2022.2.15.) 가정용 전기기기 대기전력저감 프로그램운용규정
evidence.pageTarget: Korean standby power reduction program regulation

evidence.claim: The environmental and reliability scope includes IP code testing under KS C IEC 60529:2013 with IP1X through IP6X and IPX1 through IPX8.
evidence.evidenceText: KS C IEC 60529:2013 환경 및 신뢰성 외함의 밀폐 보호등급 구분(IP코드) ... IP1X, IP2X, IP3X, IP4X, IP5X, IP6X IPX1, IPX2, IPX3, IPX4, IPX5, IPX6, IPX7, IPX8

evidence.claim: The environmental and reliability scope includes IK code testing under KS C IEC 62262:2021 for IK04, IK06, IK07, and IK08.
evidence.evidenceText: KS C IEC 62262:2021 환경 및 신뢰성 외부 기계적 충격에 대한 전기기기용 외함의 보호 등급(IK 코드) ... IK04, IK06, IK07, IK08

reviewFlags.reason: Cover page metadata is absent from the provided source text; title, organization, and KOLAS authority are inferred from sourcePath rather than body text.
Document date is not present as a certificate-level date; dates appearing in standards and notices were not used as the document date.
Source text appears to start at page 2 of 283 and consists mainly of accreditation scope tables.
Some OCR artifacts and spacing issues are present, including split standard numbers and mixed unit glyphs.
authoritySignal says MFDS/domestic, but the provided file path indicates a KOLAS accreditation certificate; source text does not explicitly resolve the authority.
